original_image_tags: A scan of the back side of a typewritten document page. The text from the front of the page is visible in reverse, showing through the paper. The top of the page has two black hole-punch marks. At the bottom, there are several blue ink stamps, oriented upside down relative to the main text.

elements.description: Multiple blue and black ink stamps are visible on the page. Stamps include 'RECEIVED', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI', and 'NATIONAL SECURITY' with dates such as 'DEC 29 4 07 PM '48' and 'DEC 30 2 27 AM '48'. Faint, reversed typed text is visible through the paper.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific stamp text ('RECEIVED', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI', etc.) that Description A does not mention, creating a direct contradiction on whether such readable text exists in the visual content.
